calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Affirming Sister State Judgment Confirming Trust Assets And Instructions For Enfo
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jane Hanawalt appeared by telephone for Craig McMicken (Successor Trustee).

Ms. Hanawalt stated that Mr. Pitney died on February 14, 2010, that the Decedent (Ms. Zeller) died on January 2, 2017 and that all of the Beneficiaries were served with notice. The Court granted the Petition for Order Affirming Sister State Judgment Confirming Trust Asset, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
